title: Citadel Lens
description: Evaluation, monitoring, and guardrails for your AI agents, generative AI, and predictive AI systems. Iteratively design highly domain-specific metrics that combine human expertise and LLM judges.

items: Adversarial red-teaming: goal drift, prompt injection, hallucination chaining, & over-permissioned tool usage.
Validate agent decisions against expected goal plans.
Monitor agent memory mutation patterns for drift, LLM Incident Detection & Response, Runtime guardrails & moderation; anomalous tool use
Correlate telemetry from agent step tracing, tool execution, & message logs.
